basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Radiotherapy Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 19 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) Radiotherapy Technician Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://gsssb.gujarat.gov.in/. A total of 19 vacancies have been announced through the GSSSB Radiotherapy Technician Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 36 years Age Relaxation: General Female: 5 years (max 40); Reserved Male: 5 years (max 40); Reserved Female: 10 years (max 45); PWD: 10-20 years (max 45); Ex-Servicemen: service period + 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: HSC with Science (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics), 2 years Radiotherapy Technologist course with 2 years infield training OR B.Sc in Medical Radiotherapy Technology with 1 year infield training, Basic computer knowledge, Knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both
qualification.details: Higher Secondary School Certificate Examination with science subjects (Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics) and two years' Radiotherapy Technologist course with two years infield training approved by Atomic Energy Regulatory Board, Mumbai OR Bachelor's degree in science in Medical Radiotherapy Technology with one year infield training approved by Atomic Energy Regulatory Board, Mumbai; basic knowledge of computer application; adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both

salary_details.details: Rs. 26,000/- fixed per month for first 5 years; thereafter Pay Scale Rs. 25,500/- to 81,100/- (Level-4)

selection_process: Part-B 120 marks) Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GSSSB Radiotherapy Technician Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download GSSSB Radiotherapy Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSSSB Radiotherapy Technician posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the GSSSB Radiotherapy Technician posts is 29 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Radiotherapy Technician post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 36 years for the Radiotherapy Technician post. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have completed HSC with Science (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics) and a 2-year Radiotherapy Technologist course with 2 years infield training, or a B.Sc in Medical Radiotherapy Technology with 1 year infield training.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Radiotherapy Technician position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 19 vacancies available for the Radiotherapy Technician post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-. For SC/ST and Women candidates, the fee is Rs. 400/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for GSSSB Radiotherapy Technician Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a CBRT/OMR MCQ Examination, Document Verification, and the final Merit List preparation.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Radiotherapy Technician post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 26,000/- fixed per month for the first 5 years, and thereafter the Pay Scale is Rs. 25,500/- to 81,100/- (Level-4).

faq.question: Q8. Can female candidates apply for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, female candidates can apply. There is a specific application fee for women, and age relaxation is also provided.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of GSSSB.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
